items.title: Maker / checker / approver workflow
items.description: End-to-end Maker / checker / approver workflow workflow. Roles: Maker (initiates), Checker (independent verification), Approver (final authorization), Auditor (read-only review). Required data: Entity payload, monetary or sensitive fields, maker identity, timestamps, reason notes. Validations: Maker cannot equal checker; mandatory fields present; value within maker limit; duplicate detection. Approval stages: Stage 1 Make, Stage 2 Check (independent user), Stage 3 Approve when above threshold. Audit trail: every state transition records actor, timestamp, before/after state and reason as an immutable audit event. Exception paths: Returned-for-correction loops to Maker; rejected with reason terminates; recall before check allowed. Key controls: Segregation of duties, value limits per role, full audit event per transition, no self-approval.

items.title: Four-eyes (dual control) approval
items.description: End-to-end Four-eyes (dual control) approval workflow. Roles: Initiator, Second Authorizer (must differ from initiator), Auditor. Required data: Action descriptor, target record, both actor identities, decision timestamps. Validations: Two distinct authenticated users; both within authority; quorum of 2 met before commit. Approval stages: Single approval stage requiring two independent authorizations before the action executes. Audit trail: every state transition records actor, timestamp, before/after state and reason as an immutable audit event. Exception paths: Timeout without second authorization expires the request; either party may decline with reason. Key controls: Dual control enforced server-side, distinct-actor check, audit of both signatures, idempotent commit.

items.title: Multi-level approval matrix
items.description: End-to-end Multi-level approval matrix workflow. Roles: Requestor, Tier approvers (L1..Ln) resolved from an authority matrix, Delegate approvers. Required data: Request amount/category, cost centre, approval matrix rows (threshold, role, sequence). Validations: Resolve required tiers from amount/category; each tier within its band; no skipped mandatory tier. Approval stages: Sequential or parallel tiers; higher amount adds tiers; each tier approves or rejects. Audit trail: every state transition records actor, timestamp, before/after state and reason as an immutable audit event. Exception paths: Delegation when approver absent; escalation on timeout; rejection at any tier stops the chain. Key controls: Matrix-driven routing (no hardcoded approvers), per-tier audit, delegation logged, threshold enforced.

items.title: Transaction release / batch release
items.description: End-to-end Transaction release / batch release workflow. Roles: Capturer, Releaser (independent), Operations supervisor. Required data: Held transaction/batch, captured totals, control totals, release window, cut-off time. Validations: Captured count and amount equal control totals; within cut-off; releaser <> capturer. Approval stages: Hold after capture, independent release before settlement cut-off. Audit trail: every state transition records actor, timestamp, before/after state and reason as an immutable audit event. Exception paths: Partial release blocked; hold past cut-off rolls to next window; recall before release. Key controls: Control-total reconciliation, cut-off enforcement, independent release, audit of release.

items.title: Payment authorization
items.description: End-to-end Payment authorization workflow. Roles: Payment initiator, Authorizer(s) by limit, Sanctions/compliance gate, Settlement operator. Required data: Beneficiary, amount, currency, account, value date, mandate reference, screening result. Validations: Account active and funded, beneficiary valid, amount within limit, screening clear, no duplicate. Approval stages: Limit-based authorization tiers plus mandatory screening pass before queueing for settlement. Audit trail: every state transition records actor, timestamp, before/after state and reason as an immutable audit event. Exception paths: Screening hit routes to compliance hold; insufficient funds rejects; recall before settlement. Key controls: Limit checks, sanctions gate, duplicate detection, idempotency key, full payment audit trail.

items.title: Rejection-code mapping and handling
items.description: End-to-end Rejection-code mapping and handling workflow. Roles: Processing engine, Operations analyst, Customer-facing agent. Required data: Raw reason from scheme/host, mapped internal code, retryable flag, customer message template. Validations: Every raw code maps to a known internal code; unknown codes flagged; retryable computed correctly. Approval stages: Mapping table changes are approved; automated handling for retryable, manual for non-retryable. Audit trail: every state transition records actor, timestamp, before/after state and reason as an immutable audit event. Exception paths: Unmapped code routes to manual triage; non-retryable returns to customer with reason. Key controls: Versioned mapping table, no silent drop of unknown codes, audit of mapping decisions.

Required data: Cheque image, OCR fields (amount, payee, date, MICR), confidence scores, corrected values. Validations: Low-confidence fields flagged for review; amount words vs figures reconciled; MICR valid. Approval stages: Operator confirms or corrects low-confidence fields; supervisor approves overrides. Audit trail: every state transition records actor, timestamp, before/after state and reason as an immutable audit event. Exception paths: Unreadable image routes to manual capture, mismatch holds, duplicate cheque detection. Key controls: Confidence-gated review, human-in-the-loop, no auto-accept of low confidence, audit of corrections.

items.title: Signature / forgery review
items.description: End-to-end Signature / forgery review workflow. Roles: Verification engine, Reviewer, Senior approver, Fraud officer. Required data: Specimen signatures, presented signature, similarity score, decision, evidence package. Validations: Score is advisory not conclusive; high-risk items always reviewed; evidence retained. Approval stages: Reviewer accepts or queries; senior approval for high-value or borderline cases. Audit trail: every state transition records actor, timestamp, before/after state and reason as an immutable audit event. Exception paths: Suspected forgery routes to fraud, no specimen blocks, borderline escalates. Key controls: Detection separated from verification, human decision recorded, evidence retained, no conclusive auto-claim.

items.title: Exception queue management
items.description: End-to-end Exception queue management workflow. Roles: System (raises exceptions), Queue operator, Team lead, Approver. Required data: Exception type, source reference, severity, assignment, age, resolution notes. Validations: Every exception classified and assigned; severity drives priority; no item left unowned. Approval stages: Operator resolves routine items; lead approves high-severity resolutions. Audit trail: every state transition records actor, timestamp, before/after state and reason as an immutable audit event. Exception paths: Aged items escalate, reassignment on absence, bulk actions require justification. Key controls: Ownership enforced, ageing SLA, severity routing, resolution audit, no silent dismissal.

items.title: Operational dashboard review
items.description: End-to-end Operational dashboard review workflow. Roles: Operator, Team lead, Operations manager. Required data: Queue depths, SLA breaches, exception counts, throughput, ageing, health snapshot. Validations: Metrics sourced from a cached snapshot (never live blocking calls), thresholds defined, drill-down available. Approval stages: Lead acknowledges flagged metrics; manager signs off the periodic review. Audit trail: every state transition records actor, timestamp, before/after state and reason as an immutable audit event. Exception paths: Stale snapshot warning, threshold breach action item, missing-data flag. Key controls: Cached read (no synchronous external calls on render), threshold alerting, review audit.

items.title: Backup / restore / rollback
items.description: End-to-end Backup / restore / rollback workflow. Roles: Operator, DBA, Change approver, Verifier. Required data: Backup set, restore point, verification result, rollback plan, environment. Validations: Backup integrity verified, restore point valid, target environment confirmed, approval obtained. Approval stages: Restore/rollback into production requires change approval and a second operator. Audit trail: every state transition records actor, timestamp, before/after state and reason as an immutable audit event. Exception paths: Corrupt backup blocks restore, partial restore handling, failed-rollback escalation. Key controls: Integrity verification, approval before production restore, post-restore verification, audit.

items.title: Release approval
items.description: End-to-end Release approval workflow. Roles: Developer, Release manager, QA, Approver, Operations. Required data: Build artefact, test results, change list, rollback plan, approval sign-offs. Validations: Build succeeds, tests pass, change list reviewed, rollback plan present before deploy. Approval stages: QA sign-off and release-manager approval gate the deployment; emergency path documented. Audit trail: every state transition records actor, timestamp, before/after state and reason as an immutable audit event. Exception paths: Failed gate blocks release, hotfix expedited approval, post-deploy verification failure rolls back. Key controls: Build-and-test gate, mandatory rollback plan, approval before deploy, deployment audit.

items.title: Autonomous patch proposal (AI-suggested fix)
items.description: End-to-end Autonomous patch proposal (AI-suggested fix) workflow. Roles: AI agent (proposer), Reviewing engineer, Approver. Required data: Diagnosed issue, proposed diff, rationale, affected files, test evidence, confidence. Validations: Proposal scoped to the issue, diff bounded, tests included, no direct write to protected paths. Approval stages: Engineer reviews and a human approves before any code change is applied; AI never self-approves. Audit trail: every state transition records actor, timestamp, before/after state and reason as an immutable audit event. Exception paths: Out-of-scope changes rejected, low-confidence routed to manual, failed tests block apply. Key controls: Human approval before apply, bounded diff, test gate, full proposal audit, no auto-merge.

items.title: Human approval before AI code change
items.description: End-to-end Human approval before AI code change workflow. Roles: AI agent, Human approver, Audit log. Required data: Change intent, target files, diff, risk class, approver identity, decision timestamp. Validations: Approver authenticated and distinct from the agent, risk class assessed, approval recorded before write. Approval stages: Mandatory single human approval gate; higher-risk changes add a second approver. Audit trail: every state transition records actor, timestamp, before/after state and reason as an immutable audit event. Exception paths: Rejected with reason, expired approval re-requested, scope change re-requires approval. Key controls: Hard gate before write, distinct human approver, risk-based second approver, immutable decision audit.

items.title: Knowledge import / dedupe / approval
items.description: End-to-end Knowledge import / dedupe / approval workflow. Roles: Importer, Reviewer/curator, Approver. Required data: Source item, similarity to existing items, dedupe decision, provenance, approval status. Validations: Provenance captured, near-duplicates detected, only approved items injected into context. Approval stages: Curator reviews; approver promotes to Approved; rejected items retained but not injected. Audit trail: every state transition records actor, timestamp, before/after state and reason as an immutable audit event. Exception paths: Duplicate merged with provenance kept, low-quality rejected, conflicting item flagged. Key controls: Provenance retention, dedupe before approval, approval-before-injection, full lineage audit.

items.title: Production incident postmortem

Exception paths: Incomplete analysis re-opened, overdue action escalated, recurrence links prior postmortem. Key controls: Blameless analysis, action-item ownership and tracking, evidence linkage, approval audit.
